notes: design-md/<slug>/README.md in the awesome-design-md repository is a redirect stub to the getdesign.md landing page and does not contain the real DESIGN.md body.
The real body is bundled as brand-specific .md files in the templates/ directory of the getdesign npm package. `npx getdesign add <slug>` copies this file internally.
Therefore the scraping channel is the npm package tarball, not a web page.
manifest.json already contains brand/description/templateHash(sha256)/sourceCommit/sourceUpdatedAt in a normalized schema, so it is used directly as the index.
preview.html / preview-dark.html are not bundled in this package. Retrieve them separately from getdesign.md if needed.
Manifest count 62 = disk count 62. Missing 0, extra 0.

collision_map: files provided upstream as claude.md are stored locally as anthropic-claude.md. The reason is that Claude Code can misread claude.md as project instructions when scanning CLAUDE.md on case-insensitive filesystems such as Windows and macOS. The local manifest.json 'file' field is also rewritten to anthropic-claude.md. scripts/fetch_design_catalog.py applies COLLISION_MAP automatically during sync.
